English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Harvey Reissig papers
Reissig, Harvey.
22-2-4279
6 cubic feet. 6 cubic feet.
1969-2010. Includes correspondence, grant and consultant files, talks, reprints and slides, photographs and CDs of his research trips. Collection material in English 10062942
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Janette Park
Date completed:
September 2018
EAD encoding:
RMC Staff, September 2018
Date modified:
Fredrika Loew, October 2018
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Professor of Entomology, New York State Experiment Station, Geneva and former director of Cornell's Pesticide Management Education Program (PMEP).
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes correspondence, grant and consultant files, talks, reprints and slides, photographs and CDs of his research trips.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Research, Projects, and Assessments
Series II. Grant Files
Series III. Correspondence
Series IV. Meetings, Committees, and Conferences
Series V. Miscellaneous
Series VI. Slides Series VII. Media
Cite As:
Harvey Reissig Papers, #22-2-4279 . Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
